annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under Tenn. Code Ann. § 47-14-123 — 10% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Tennessee’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Verify against the statute text. Not legal advice.
